uplink._note: Upstream decodes this to {battery:100, occupancy:'occupied'}; re-authored to the normalized vocabulary: battery percent -> batteryPercent extra, occupancy occupied -> action.motion.detected=true.
Synthetic from the TTN example structure: occupancy byte 0 -> vacant -> action.motion.detected=false. Confirmed against reference/upstream-codec.js which yields occupancy='vacant' for the same bytes.
Synthetic single-channel occupancy uplink. Confirms action.motion is emitted independently of the battery channel.
Zero-length payload is rejected before the channel walk.

uplink.description: Unknown channel -> no recognized channels error
uplink._note: First channel/type pair (0x09/0x99) matches no VS340 channel; the walk breaks with nothing recognized.
